allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const code=fs.readFileSync\('game17.js','utf8'\); let open=0,close=0; for\(const c of code\){if\(c==='{'\)open++;if\(c==='}'\)close++;} console.log\('open:',open,'close:',close,'diff:',open-close\);")

PowerShell($code = Get-Content 'C:\\3D_prj\\VS_2022_prj\\FlowerMoon_web\\game17.js' -Raw; $open = [regex]::Matches\($code, '\\{'\).Count; $close = [regex]::Matches\($code, '\\}'\).Count; $parOpen = [regex]::Matches\($code, '\\\('\).Count; $parClose = [regex]::Matches\($code, '\\\)'\).Count; Write-Host "braces: open=$open close=$close diff=$\($open-$close\)"; Write-Host "parens: open=$parOpen close=$parClose diff=$\($parOpen-$parClose\)")
